title: PokitDok - Healthcare API Platform (Change Healthcare)
problem: Digital health companies need easy access to healthcare data and transactions: eligibility, claims, appointments, and more.
solution: API-first healthcare platform. X12 transactions, eligibility verification, claims submission, appointment scheduling, and more. Developer-friendly APIs for healthcare transactions.
technology: REST APIs, X12 transactions, healthcare data exchange
varden_fit: CRITICAL — PokitDok's API-first approach is exactly what European digital health needs. Healthcare transactions as APIs.
notes: CONTRARIAN: API-first healthcare infrastructure is the future. European developers lack equivalent platforms.
